vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start
vBRIEFInfo.description: Auto-synthesized minimal plan for PAN-1069: Add /hello test route to dashboard server

plan.title: Add /hello test route to dashboard server
plan.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start

narratives.Problem:
## Summary

Add a minimal HTTP route to the Panopticon dashboard server that returns a simple HTML page when accessed at \`/hello\`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- \`GET /hello\` returns HTTP 200
- Response body is exactly: \`<html><body>Hello</body></html>\`
- \`Content-Type\` header is \`text/html\`
- Route is registered in the main Effect HTTP router alongside existing routes

## Why

Small smoke-test route used to verify the full Panopticon review/work pipeline end-to-end without domain complexity getting in the way.

## Implementation Notes

- Add a new route handler file \`src/dashboard/server/routes/hello.ts\`
- Register it in \`src/dashboard/server/server.ts\` (or wherever routes are composed)
- No auth, no DB, no side effects — pure request/response
narratives.Proposal: Implement the issue directly from the tracker-provided title and body.
